title: Empusa sootenzanensis
taxonomy: Empusa sootenzanensis is a species of fungus, specifically belonging to the genus Empusa within the family Entomophthoraceae. Empusa sootenzanensis is a type of insect-pathogenic fungus. It is characterized by its ability to infect and kill various insect species. The classification of this fungus is further supported by its morphological and molecular characteristics. As a member of the Entomophthoraceae family, Empusa sootenzanensis plays a crucial role in regulating insect populations in ecosystems.
benefits: Empusa sootenzanensis, a species of fungus, has been reported to have potential health benefits due to its unique properties.
